metadata.title: Shadow Chronicles: Anchor 1
metadata.description: You wake as Subject ANCHOR-47 in a cryo pod beneath a dead city. Reality is fraying. Restore power, get past what the war left in containment, and reach the Anchor Chamber to stabilize ANCHOR 1. Adapted from the Shadow Chronicles game.

locations.name: Cryo Chamber
locations.base_prose: A cylindrical cryo pod hangs open, rimmed with melting frost. Cold vapor curls across the floor and emergency lighting flickers, throwing long shadows on the metal walls. A door leads south into a dark hallway.

locations.name: Dark Hallway
locations.base_prose: A junction of scorched corridors. Doors branch east to the medical bay and west to a security office; north opens onto the central hub, and the cryo chamber lies back to the north... no, the way you came.

locations.name: Medical Bay
locations.base_prose: Overturned gurneys and shattered vials. A wall cabinet still holds a sealed medkit.

locations.name: Security Office
locations.base_prose: Monitors hiss static over a cluttered desk. A keycard lies in a drawer and a multi-tool knife rests beside a cold cup of coffee.

locations.name: Central Hub
locations.base_prose: The spine of Sublevel 3. Passages run east to the science wing and west to engineering. A reinforced door north, marked COMMAND, blinks a red card-reader.

locations.name: Science Wing Entrance
locations.base_prose: A biometric scanner guards the inner lab, its slot dark and unpowered. The hub lies west.

locations.name: Primary Science Lab
locations.base_prose: Burned notebooks and a humming research terminal. A lab access badge dangles from a dead technician's lanyard. A sealed door north reads SPECIMEN CONTAINMENT.

locations.name: Specimen Containment
locations.base_prose: Shattered glass and a reek of ozone. Something psionically warped twitches in the dark — and behind it, on a cradle, an anchor interface key.

locations.name: Engineering Wing Entrance
locations.base_prose: Pipes sweat condensation along the walls. The hub is east; a utility corridor runs west.

locations.name: Utility Corridor
locations.base_prose: A cramped service run. Doors lead north to the generator room, south to pump control, and west into a maintenance crawlspace.

locations.name: Generator Room
locations.base_prose: Dead turbines loom in the gloom. An auxiliary power cell sits half-seated in a maintenance slot, still charged.

locations.name: Pump Control Room
locations.base_prose: Gauges sit at zero. A detached pump-control handle lies on the console.

locations.name: Maintenance Crawlspace
locations.base_prose: A tight, wire-choked tube. Exposed conduits spark. An insulated toolkit is wedged against a bulkhead.

locations.name: Command Corridor
locations.base_prose: Brushed steel and dead status boards. The hub is south, an observation deck east, and the anchor antechamber north.

locations.name: Observation Deck
locations.base_prose: A long window onto black rock. A command console still cycles a log — and an activation code: EPSILON-7-THETA.

locations.name: Anchor Antechamber
locations.base_prose: A pressure lock thrums with a sound you feel in your teeth. A keyed hatch north leads to the Anchor Chamber.

locations.name: Anchor Chamber — ANCHOR 1
locations.base_prose: A vast sphere of humming reality-stabilization gear. At its heart, ANCHOR 1 waits, an activation terminal pulsing in time with your pulse.

connections.description: Into the lab (scanner must be powered).
North through the keyed hatch (anchor key).

quests.name: Project Anchor
quests.description: Restore the anchor systems and stabilize ANCHOR 1.

objectives.description: Deal with the specimen in containment.

quests.name: Echoes of the Dead
quests.description: Read the lab's psionic research and attune your mind.

actions.name: Look around
actions.description: Take in your surroundings.

actions.name: Go to the cryo chamber
actions.description: Return to the cryo chamber.

actions.name: Go to the dark hallway
actions.description: Head into the dark hallway.

actions.name: Go to the medical bay
actions.description: Enter the medical bay.

actions.name: Go to the security office
actions.description: Enter the security office.

actions.name: Go to the central hub
actions.description: Head to the central hub.

actions.name: Go to the science wing
actions.description: Head to the science wing entrance.

actions.name: Go to the science lab
actions.description: Enter the primary science lab.

actions.name: Go to specimen containment
actions.description: Step into the containment chamber.

actions.name: Go to engineering
actions.description: Head to the engineering wing entrance.

actions.name: Go to the utility corridor
actions.description: Enter the utility corridor.

actions.name: Go to the generator room
actions.description: Enter the generator room.

actions.name: Go to pump control
actions.description: Enter the pump control room.

actions.name: Go to the crawlspace
actions.description: Squeeze into the maintenance crawlspace.

actions.name: Go to the command corridor
actions.description: Pass through the COMMAND door.

actions.name: Go to the observation deck
actions.description: Step onto the observation deck.

actions.name: Go to the anchor antechamber
actions.description: Enter the anchor antechamber.

actions.name: Go to the anchor chamber
actions.description: Open the keyed hatch into the Anchor Chamber.

actions.name: Take the flashlight
actions.description: Grab the flashlight from the pod.

actions.name: Take the medkit
actions.description: Pocket the sealed medkit.

actions.name: Take the keycard
actions.description: Take the command keycard from the drawer.

actions.name: Take the multi-tool knife
actions.description: Take the multi-tool knife from the desk.

actions.name: Take the power cell
actions.description: Pull the auxiliary power cell from its slot.

actions.name: Take the insulated toolkit
actions.description: Free the insulated toolkit from the bulkhead.

actions.name: Insert the power cell
actions.description: Seat the power cell into the biometric scanner.

actions.name: Take the lab access badge
actions.description: Lift the lab access badge from the lanyard.

actions.name: Read the research terminal
actions.description: Study the lab's psionic research logs.

actions.name: Attack the specimen
actions.description: Strike the warped specimen with the knife.

actions.name: Rush the specimen barehanded
actions.description: Throw yourself at the specimen with nothing but your hands.

actions.name: Take the anchor interface key
actions.description: Lift the anchor interface key from the cradle.

actions.name: Read the command console
actions.description: Read the activation code from the command console.

actions.name: Activate ANCHOR 1
actions.description: Enter the code EPSILON-7-THETA and stabilize ANCHOR 1.

parameters.reason: Reality settles around you as ANCHOR 1 hums to life. For now, the boundary holds.

npcs.name: Psionically Warped Specimen
npcs.dialogue_seed: A former test subject collapsed into something that should not move the way it moves. It does not speak; it lunges. Steel ends it; bare hands do not.
